body.description: Request to submit a signed transaction for execution.

party.description: The unique Party ID on whose behalf the transaction is being submitted. This Party must have the necessary permissions.

commands.description: Container for the command payload to be executed on the ledger.

signed_transaction.description: A cryptographically signed transaction payload that defines the action to perform (such as creating or updating a contract). This ensures the request is authorized and tamper-proof.

timeout.description: The maximum number of seconds the server should wait for the transaction to complete before returning a timeout response.
